channel.title: live-streaming on Kuldeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in live-streaming on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: Speaker - Gatherverse Summit 2026
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: 📢 Gatherverse Summit 2026: Human Needs. Emergence. Trust. GGatherVerse Summit 2026 marks our fifth annual gathering of experts and community leaders who advance people-first standards for AI, spatial, and other new tools. We focus on clear methods, results you can test, and open resources that others can reuse I’m excited to be part of the Roundtable panel: Human Impact: The Next Responsibilities of Innovation" alongside industry leaders and innovators!

item.title: Livestreaming
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Human Impact: The Next Responsibilities of Innovation Gatherverse Summit 2026 - ☞ More Details XR Symposium - User Interaction and Experience Design for Global South IIT madras hosted XR Symposium 2025 - ☞ More Details Machine Gaze - What Happens When Glasses Begin to Think Gatherverse XR Evolve Summit 2025 - ☞ More Details The Metaverse United : How AI and XR Can Deepen Human Connections Gatherverse Summit 2025 - ☞ More Details Defining the AI Powered Virtual World Gatherverse Virtual World Symposium 2024 - ☞ More Details India’s Metaverse Journey: Opportunities and Challenges XROM Postcast - ☞ More Details Global Insights from XR Leaders in India: AI-Powered Real-Time Adaptation in XR AWE Asia 2024 - ☞ More Details Harnessing Business Opportunity with AI Powered XR Express Computer Webinar - ☞ More Details Azure AI Fostering Sense within XR World Season of AI - Azure Developer Community - Rekill - ☞ More Details Evolving into Tomorrow, Today: Enter the Metaverse Gatherverse XREvolve Summit 2024 - ☞ More Details Exploring the Metaverse: Redefining the reality in the digital age Book promo - ☞ More Details XR in practice: the engineering challenges of extending reality Thoughtworks Podcast - ☞ More Details AI Assisted Content Pipeline for XR Thoughtworks XConf 2022 - ☞ More Details Using XR in building autonomous vehicles Thoughtworks MasterClass-2021 - ☞ More Details   The Shift from Enterprise XR to Ethical XR Thoughtworks XConf 2021 - ☞ More Details Navigating the new normal The VRARA - ☞ More Details eXtended Reality for Enterprise XROM Podcast - ☞ More Details XR - Nicety to Necessity Techgig Webinars - ☞ More Details How to get started with AR VR?

item.title: Speaker - Gatherverse AI Summit 2026
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: 📢 Gatherverse AI Summit 2026: Humanity’s Path Forward. GatherVerse AI Summit is a global consortium dedicated to bringing informed dialogues at the crossroads of AI and emerging technologies and their implications for humanity. In 2023, we set our sights on the transformative power of AI, unearthing its profound impacts on societal structures, beliefs, and the very fabric of human existence. At GatherVerse AI Summit 2026, we will continue to climb as we focus on the evolving capabilities of AI and its integration into every facet of human life, governance, businesses and industries.

item.title: Speaker | Gatherverse Book Summit 2025
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: 📢 Gatherverse Book Summit 2025: Exploring Books, Language and Meaning in the Age of New Technology. In the intersection of emerging technologies and humanity, this GatherVerse event aims to deep dive into the current and future state of books in an age defined by artificial intelligence. This is a space for authors, researchers, engineers, ethicists, educators, publishers, technologists and readers. We explore what it means to write, publish, and trust books in a time where machine-generated language is flooding the landscape

item.title: Speaker - Gatherverse Summit 2025
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: 📢 Gatherverse Summit 2025: Innovating for Human Betterment Now and Forever. Climb. GatherVerse Summit 2025 marks the fourth annual gathering of global experts and community leaders discussing humanity-first standards in the approach to AI, the metaverse, and emerging technologies I’m excited to be part of the Roundtable Panel Discussion on “The Metaverse United : How AI and XR Can Deepen Human Connections” alongside industry leaders and innovators! 🗓 Session Details Date & Time: Feb 25, 2025, 11:20 AM - 12:10 PM PST Roundtable Panel: The Metaverse United : How AI and XR Can Deepen Human Connections Moderator: Lynn Gitau - Director of Communications, Gatherverse Panelists: Casey Jensen - Head of Client Partnerships, Zebrar Kuldeep Singh - Me David B.

item.title: Speaker - Gatherverse Virtual World Symposium 2024
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: 📢 Virtual World Symposium: Join us as we dive deep into the future of AI-powered virtual worlds: What are they? Where are they headed? And why is it crucial to discuss these transformative spaces to..day? This symposium will also unpack spatial intelligence and its role in defining and enhancing immersive environments. As we step into a new era of digital interaction, this event will provide insights into the challenges and opportunities that virtual worlds bring to society.
